title: Verify existing pagination implementation
description: The paginate<T> function already exists in src/services/pagination.ts with comprehensive tests in pagination.test.ts. All 12 tests pass. Implementation includes: generic pagination function, proper error handling for invalid page/pageSize, slice-based data extraction, total/pages/hasNext metadata, and coverage for edge cases (empty arrays, page beyond range, remainder handling).
existing_patterns: src/services/*.ts - Service layer utility modules with co-located .test.ts files, following vitest testing conventions
